title: supplier_project_component_matrix.py output
description: Requires --supplier (always). --component and --project are optional additional filters (--project narrows to one project_number; not validated against the shared commons.py filter set since project isn't a dimension the rest of the skill's scripts support). All figures are the target supplier's own data only — no peer comparison. The heatmap image is component-level only (project x component_category, spend); component_breakdown mirrors that same grouping in JSON, and criticality_breakdown adds a finer project x component x criticality grouping the heatmap does not visualize.

component_breakdown.description: One row per (project_number, component_category) combination present in scope, sorted by project_number then total_spend descending. This is what the heatmap visualizes (spend only).

criticality_breakdown.description: One row per (project_number, component_category, component_criticality) combination present in scope, sorted by project_number then total_spend descending. Not visualized in the heatmap — JSON-only detail.
